response.name: The Stable
response.ambient: A small stable, four stalls. Two stalls are empty — straw scattered, gates hanging open. The third stall has a broken gate: wood splintered outward, lock still attached, hasp intact, bolt thrown. The

visible_renders.name: Broken Stall Gate (third stall)
visible_renders.one_line: The gate of the third stall is splintered outward — wood broken from the inside

obvious_edges.name: out

obvious_edges.name: south

response.active_state_text: The haulem stands in the fourth stall, motionless. Blue eyes dim. The broken gate of the third stall hangs as it has hung. The stable is empty otherwise.
